query: extreme harsh chiaroscuro single light source dramatic black abstract shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: extreme chiaroscuro — single-source dramatic, abstract black/shadow play, deep contrast pushed to graphic abstraction

response.objective_caption: A square-format black and white image showing smooth, curved gray forms against a deep black background. Diagonal bands of light gradient intersect with two prominent peaked edges in the lower portion of the frame, creating a minimalist composition of luminous highlights and velvety shadows.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract black and white photograph that abandons representational clarity in favor of pure form and tonal contrast. Smooth, curved gray shapes and diagonal bands of light emerge from deep black shadows, with sharp peaked edges and soft gradients creating a minimalist composition focused on gesture, texture, and spatial ambiguity rather than identifiable subject matter.
